title: Nyxis — Zero-Copy Binary Serialization Protocol
description: Nyxis (NXS): row, columnar, and PAX .nxb layouts. 7 µs streaming TTFR (EPYC 9R14), columnar scan 1.3× Arrow IPC on AVX-512, sub-µs warm access.

title: Nyxis — High-Throughput System Topologies & Use Cases
description: Production topologies for mmap .nxb ingestion, streamable v1.2 sealing, row/columnar/PAX layouts, append-only WALs, Arrow bridges, and multi-terabyte data-grid deployments.

title: Nyxis — Commercial Pricing
description: Transparent Nyxis open-core pricing: free BSL production tier, Startup/Growth at $3,500/year, Enterprise Core at $15,000/year, and Principal custom quotes.

title: Benchmark — Nyxis NXS
description: Interactive NXS vs JSON vs CSV benchmark charts at 1k–10M records in the browser, with optional fixture upload.

title: Demo — Nyxis NXS
description: Live browser demos: NXS vs JSON and CSV benchmarks, ticker, workers, explorer, WAL, and report layout.

title: Ticker — Nyxis NXS
description: Side-by-side JSON stringify/parse vs in-place float64 patch on mapped .nxb — frame timing and drop rate under pressure.

title: Workers — Nyxis NXS
description: Four Web Workers: JSON structured clone vs SharedArrayBuffer handoff for the same .nxb dataset.

title: Log explorer — Nyxis NXS
description: Virtual scroll over millions of lines backed by mapped .nxb.

title: Report layout — Nyxis NXS
description: CSV to row and columnar .nxb in the browser; chart from col_buffer.

title: WAL / spans — Nyxis NXS
description: OTel-style span ingestion — append-only WAL vs JSON payloads.
